channel.title: Dream Space on by stephanie navarro
channel.description: Recent content in Dream Space on by stephanie navarro

item.title: untitled 00
item.description:
my hand is pressed against your window.

let me in- I’m far from home and I’m so tired. I have questions I need to ask you:

was there love here? was there pain? how do I go back? how do I come home?

I watch your hand draw the blinds closed.

I used to ask God with all my heart to let me fly I used to ask God with all my heart to let me die.

item.title: untitled 01
item.description:
maybe we’ll all dance one day bare feet on dewy grass- my pains my sunshines my strengths my weaknesses- maybe one day we’ll creep out of the shadows and show the world our faces. the light and the dark. she’ll meet us at that place take us into her center.

hug me, hold me here look at me again tell me that the things I’ve made are beautiful tell me that you remember me tell me that you see me. tell me you won’t go away again that you love me and we can share the world again.

item.title: stuck in my head
item.description:
there are times when my light feels dim when the words I say feel like they fall out of my mouth and thud onto the floor. there are times where i want to slip into the corners of my mind and stay there, spend my days staring at the wallks.

to know me is to know my pain- so I let those memories trickle down my throat let the pain branch through my body let that ancient storm swallow me,

item.title: behind the walls
item.description:
little woman, big girl.

the garden i grow is a home you’ll never see; a world you’ll never know.

I worked tirelessly, living only off of the hope that you would see it and smile.

I dream of it the day our hands touch again. I’ll show you all the fruit I grew out of my tears and you’ll pick me up and we’ll run across the world leaving my garden to rot.
